items.title: 🤔 Permutations: How teams qualify for knockouts
items.summary: Who can secure qualification before the group stage ends, and whose World Cup dreams could be shattered? Here's what you need to know.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Olympic walking champion faces 3rd doping ban
items.summary: Alex Schwazer is facing a third doping ban after the National Anti Doping Agency of Germany said it detected the blood-boosting drug EPO in his samples.
items.whyItMatters: Running and athletics widen the page beyond match coverage into performance and training stories.

items.title: Scotland eliminated after New Zealand loss
items.summary: Scotland are knocked out of the ICC's Women's T20 World Cup despite Darcey Carter's remaining unbeaten on 72 runs as they lose to defending champions New Zealand in Bristol.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
